title: The Shandia Join the Battle
description: Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji push into the ordeal while Nami, Zoro, Robin, and Chopper face the danger around the altar.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this scene centers on Gan Fall, Luffy, Shandia warrior, Wyper, Conis. Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji push into the ordeal while Nami, Zoro, Robin, and Chopper face the danger around the altar.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Paddle as fast as you can!!!

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: Look! In front! Luffy, hit the brake!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: It's too late! Take the wheel, usopp!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The entrance... is already so far away...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: How about we get off now?

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: While we're on this milky road...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey, looks like it's a dead end!

dialogue.speaker: Gedatsu
dialogue.text: trial of swamp, trial of iron,

dialogue.speaker: Conis
dialogue.text: trial of string, trial of balls.

summary: Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji push into the ordeal while Nami, Zoro, Robin, and Chopper face the danger around the altar.
